data.title: Aris Mining buys remaining 49% of Soto Norte joint venture in Colombia from MDC Industry Holding.
data.description: A mining company based in Vancouver, BC, Aris Mining Corporation, recently finalized its acquisition of the remaining 49% stake in the Soto Norte joint venture in Colombia from MDC Industry Holding. This move was announced on December 12, 2025. Aris Mining, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under TSX: ARIS and on the New York Stock Exchange as NYSE-A: ARMN, completed this acquisition as part of its strategic expansion efforts.

data.title: BitFuFu recognized in TOP 100 Next Generation Companies for 2025 for its innovation and global mining impact.
data.description: BitFuFu has been selected as one of the Top 100 Next Generation Companies for 2025 by the World Future Awards. The recognition is based on the company's innovation, global mining scale, and industry impact. With this achievement, BitFuFu joins an elite group of companies leading the way in the future business landscape. This honor highlights the company's significant contributions and success, positioning it as a key player in the industry for years to come.

data.title: Larry Ellison's financial pledge for Paramount's bid for Warner Bros raises questions due to some uncertainties in his billion-dollar commitment.
data.description: A significant move has been made by the co-founder of Oracle, who has promised to provide billions of dollars to support Paramount's acquisition bid for Warner Bros. Discovery. However, doubts have surfaced regarding the level of dedication towards this financial commitment.

data.title: Jacob Asbury appointed as CFO of Tharimmune, Inc. to support Canton Coin strategy. (Numbers: NASDAQ: THAR, Chief Financial Officer)
data.description: Tharimmune, Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR), headquartered in New York, has appointed Jacob Asbury as its new Chief Financial Officer. Tharimmune is leading the way in utilizing Canton Coin (CC) to enhance the Canton Network's capacity to modernize traditional financial markets. As CFO, Asbury will be responsible for all financial aspects, such as capital planning, treasury management, and financial operations. His appointment is effective immediately, signaling a strategic move by the company to strengthen its financial leadership.

data.title: Coinbase to launch prediction markets and tokenized equities, competing with Kalshi and Polymarket. Combined monthly volumes rose to $7.7B in Nov from $1.3B in Aug.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is reportedly set to introduce prediction markets and tokenized equities next week, as its stock trades lower within a larger downtrend. A source familiar with the matter mentioned that Coinbase is internally developing the tokenized equities offering, without any external partners. The company's spokesperson encouraged viewers to watch a livestream on Dec. 17 for further information but did not confirm specific product details. Recent screenshots circulating online displayed early versions of these features within the Coinbase app, fueling speculation leading up to the launch event. This move aligns Coinbase with other prominent cryptocurrency platforms venturing into prediction markets. Kalshi and Polymarket currently lead the sector, with their combined monthly volumes increasing to about $7.7 billion in November from approximately $1.3 billion in August. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sinners and Frankenstein lead the 2025 Astra Creative Arts Film Awards, while The Pitt wins big at the TV awards.71-character summary.
data.description: Tonight, in Burbank, CA, the Hollywood Creative Alliance (HCA) recognized the victorious recipients of the 2025 Astra Creative Arts Awards during a ceremony at Castaway Burbank. This event paid tribute to the talented individuals who excelled in their respective fields, showcasing their exceptional skills. The prestigious awards ceremony highlighted the achievements of these artisans in the creative arts industry.

data.title: Florida confiscates $1.5M in cryptocurrencies including Dogecoin, Pepe, and Solana linked to fraud case involving a Chinese national.
data.description: Authorities utilized a fugitive disentitlement statute to confiscate Dogecoin, Solana, and various other tokens linked to a fraud case in Citrus County.

data.title: Sobi gets positive CHMP opinion for Aspaveli® for C3G and Primary IC-MPGN. 8,000 people in Europe affected. 1st treatment option for patients 12+.
data.description: Sobi® (STO: SOBI) has revealed that around 8,000 individuals in Europe are currently affected by C3G or primary IC-MPGN. If Aspaveli (pegcetacoplan) receives approval, it will mark the inaugural treatment available for C3G and primary IC-MPGN patients aged 12 and above. The announcement was made in Stockholm on December 12, 2025.
